story: After weeks of being shut out by her own leads, Riley stayed late doing inventory. She watched Victor Ruiz arrive with a box, tap an invisible keypad, and step through a wall panel. She followed before she could talk herself out of it. A narrow stair led to a hidden room where glass-topped caskets slid along a track. Julian Lord stood over a patient with chest open. “This one’s ready to close up,” Julian said. “Victor, finish it. I’ll get Larry set in cryo.” Reg Smith and Sherry MacQuoid moved another body toward a pod.
implausible_knowledge: She followed before she could talk herself out of it.
question: When Julian tells Victor to finish closing up the patient in the hidden room, what is Victor most likely to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Alert Sherry and Reg to block the stair and intercept Riley before she sees more.
answer_without_knowledge: Proceed to methodically close up the patient as ordered.
